zh.Keppoch, Dunbartonshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾凱普
zh.Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭洛-爾凱爾 本 洛哈爾申
zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean於1395年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾洛哈時，她的父親Angus MacPhee of Glen Spean15歲，母親Christian Thompson16歲。她於1440年之前與Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1472年在蘇格蘭享年77歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean于1395年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾洛哈时，她的父亲Angus MacPhee of Glen Spean15岁，母亲Christian Thompson16岁。她于1440年之前与Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1472年在苏格兰享年77岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

variants.name: McPhee
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dhuibhshíthe ‘son of Duibhshíth’, a Gaelic personal name meaning ‘dark peace’. See Irish McAfee and compare the unlenited forms McDuffie and Duffy 2.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean was born in 1395, in Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland, her father, Angus MacPhee of Glen Spean, was 15 and her mother, Christian Thompson, was 16. She married Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch before 1440, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1472, in Scotland, at the age of 77, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean est née en 1395, à Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Angus MacPhee of Glen Spean, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Christian Thompson, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch avant 1440, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1472, à Écosse, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean 1395 in Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Angus MacPhee of Glen Spean 15 und ihre Mutter Christian Thompson 16. Sie hat vor 1440 in Scotland Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1472 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean è nata il nel 1395 nel Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland, sua padre, Angus MacPhee of Glen Spean, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Christian Thompson, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch prima del 1440, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1472, nel Scotland, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine MacPhee of Glen Speanが1395年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアロチャバーで生まれた時，父Angus MacPhee of Glen Speanは15歳，母Christian Thompsonは16歳であった。1440年以前にスコットランドでAngus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppochと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1472年にスコットランドで77歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean(이)가 1395년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 럭압어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Angus MacPhee of Glen Spean(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Thompson(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1440년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1472년 스컷랜드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland: Kyle of Lochalsh, Siorrachd Rois, Шотланд

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean nasceu em 1395, em Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Angus MacPhee of Glen Spean, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Christian Thompson, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch antes 1440, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1472, em Scotland, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean родилась в 1395 г. в местности лочабир, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Angus MacPhee of Glen Spean было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Thompson, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch перед 1440 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1472 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean nació en 1395, en Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Angus MacPhee of Glen Spean, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Christian Thompson, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch antes de 1440, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1472, en Scotland, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
